tasks.name: idle
tasks.description: Gina standing, gentle idle (breathing / small bob).

tasks.name: walking
tasks.description: Gina walking cycle, side view (faces east; the engine mirrors it for west).

tasks.name: talking
tasks.description: Gina's beak-moving talk loop. For read-along lip-sync this can grow to a 7-frame mouth-shape sheet (X A B C D E F, see SPEECH.md); 3 frames stay fine as a classic loop.

tasks.name: dragged
tasks.description: Gina held mid-air by the pointer: dangling, legs paddling (loops). Until this sheet lands the game shows her idle sheet while dragged (LIVELINESS.md Part 2).

tasks.name: falling
tasks.description: Gina flutter-falling after being dropped: quick comedic wing flaps (loops while she descends).

tasks.name: landing
tasks.description: Touchdown beat: a little squat and feather puff (plays once, then back to idle).

tasks.name: peck
tasks.description: Idle fidget (LIVELINESS.md Part 1): head down, two pecks at the ground, head up (plays once).

tasks.name: headshake
tasks.description: Idle fidget: a quick left-right feather ruffle (plays once).

tasks.name: blink
tasks.description: Idle fidget: eyelids close and open (plays once).

tasks.name: shade_reminder
tasks.text: Devo mettere la crema solare prima di uscire dall'ombra!
tasks.description: Refuses to leave the umbrella's shade before sunscreen.

tasks.name: sunscreen_done
tasks.description: Taps the bottle again after applying sunscreen.

tasks.name: got_goggles
tasks.description: Collects the goggles.

tasks.name: float_blows_away
tasks.text: Oh no! Il vento ha portato il salvagente sull'albero!
tasks.description: A gust carries the pool float into the tree.

tasks.name: need_goggles
tasks.text: Mi servono gli occhialini per tuffarmi.
tasks.description: Tries to dive without the goggles.

tasks.name: float_by_pool
tasks.text: Mi serve il salvagente: e' li' vicino alla piscina.
tasks.description: Tries to dive while the float is still by the pool.

tasks.name: float_in_tree
tasks.text: Il salvagente e' sull'albero! Devo recuperarlo.
tasks.description: Tries to dive while the float is stuck in the tree.

tasks.name: dive_again
tasks.description: Splashes in and wants to go again (adventure replays).

tasks.name: cant_reach
tasks.description: Looks at the float stuck in the branches.

tasks.name: need_help
tasks.description: Second look at the stuck float.

tasks.name: ask_carla
tasks.description: Third look — thinks of asking Carla the crow.

tasks.name: hi_carla
tasks.description: Greets Carla when the float is not stuck.

tasks.name: carla_offer
tasks.text: Ti aiuto se mi porti dell'uva. Prendi questo cestino!
tasks.description: Carla's deal, in Gina's voice: grapes for the float, here's a basket.

tasks.name: carla_reminder
tasks.text: Hai gia' il cestino? Portami l'uva dalla vigna!
tasks.description: Carla reminds Gina to bring grapes.

tasks.name: carla_thanks
tasks.text: Mmm, che uva buona! Ecco il tuo salvagente!
tasks.description: Carla takes the grapes and returns the float.

tasks.name: already_grapes
tasks.description: The basket already holds grapes.

tasks.name: nothing_to_pick
tasks.description: No basket yet, so nothing to gather grapes with.

tasks.name: ready
tasks.text: Pronta! Ora posso uscire al sole!
tasks.description: Finishes rubbing in the sunscreen.

tasks.name: basket_full
tasks.text: Cestino pieno d'uva! Ora torno da Carla.
tasks.description: Fills the basket with grapes.

tasks.name: background
tasks.description: Poolside scene backdrop.

tasks.name: water
tasks.description: The pool's water surface.

tasks.name: sunscreen
tasks.description: The sunscreen bottle.

tasks.name: goggles
tasks.description: The swimming goggles.

tasks.name: float
tasks.description: The pool float / ring.

tasks.name: background
tasks.description: The tree scene backdrop.

tasks.name: carla
tasks.description: Carla the crow, perched in the tree.

tasks.name: float
tasks.description: The float, caught in the branches.

tasks.name: basket
tasks.description: The basket Carla hands over (Gina carries it).

tasks.name: background
tasks.description: The vineyard backdrop.

tasks.name: grapes
tasks.description: The grape bunch on the vine.

tasks.name: background
tasks.description: Sunscreen minigame backdrop.

tasks.name: gina
tasks.description: Close-up of Gina for the sunscreen minigame.

tasks.name: background
tasks.description: Grape-picking minigame backdrop.

tasks.name: grape
tasks.description: A single grape for the picking minigame.

tasks.name: sunscreen_boil
tasks.description: Placeholder boil for the sunscreen bottle (replaced file-for-file by traced frames).

tasks.name: goggles_boil
tasks.description: Placeholder boil for the goggles.

tasks.name: float_boil
tasks.description: Placeholder boil for the pool float.

tasks.name: voice
tasks.description: Per-scene silent voice placeholder (replaced by per-line WAVs as recordings land).

tasks.name: wind
tasks.description: The gust that carries the float into the tree.

tasks.name: splash
tasks.description: The dive splash.
